message.content:
@startuml
title Edit pet owner details

actor Vet_Central as Actor
rectangle petOwner_dialog as Dialog
database Database as DB
rectangle GoogleMapAPI as GoogleMapAPI

Actor --> Dialog : 1 extract person Id from routes
Dialog --> Dialog : 2 fetchUserDetail(personId)
Dialog --> DB : 3 (personDetails)
DB --> Dialog : 4 setState(personDetails and disable editable form field)

opt [if person detail has address]
    Dialog --> GoogleMapAPI : 5 geoCodeByPlaceId(place id from db)
    GoogleMapAPI --> Dialog : 6 (formatted_address)
end

Dialog --> Actor : 7 render()

@enduml
